accelerator_types.description: Defines the hardware accelerator types to be attached to the notebook instance, such as GPU options.

additional_code_repositories.description: List of additional Git repositories containing custom code, which will be cloned into the notebook instance; must be accessible via HTTPS.

default_code_repository.description: Specifies the default Git repository to clone for the notebook instance, either a repository name in AWS CodeCommit or a URL pointing to a Git repository.

direct_internet_access.description: Specifies whether the notebook instance has access to the internet; must be "Enabled" or "Disabled".

instance_metadata_service_configuration.description: Configuration for the instance metadata service, including options like enabling or disabling the service and setting the minimum instance metadata version.

instance_type.description: Specifies the type of ML compute instance to use for the SageMaker notebook; must be a valid EC2 instance type supported by SageMaker.

kms_key_id.description: Specifies the KMS key ARN used to encrypt data at rest for the SageMaker notebook instance; must be a valid key in the same region as the instance.

lifecycle_config_name.description: Name of the lifecycle configuration to attach to the SageMaker notebook instance; must be pre-created in the same AWS region.

name.description: Name of the SageMaker notebook instance; must be unique within your AWS account and comply with naming restrictions.

platform_identifier.description: Specifies the platform identifier for the notebook instance, determining the underlying hardware and software configuration.

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN to grant the notebook instance permissions for SageMaker operations and accessing AWS resources.

root_access.description: Specifies whether the notebook instance allows root access; must be "Enabled" or "Disabled".

security_groups.description: Specifies the security groups to associate with the notebook instance; must be in the same VPC as the instance.

subnet_id.description: ID of the subnet within which the SageMaker notebook instance will be deployed. Must belong to the specified VPC.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and manage the notebook instance, supporting resource tagging for cost allocation and access control.

volume_size.description: Defines the size of the EBS volume attached to the notebook instance, in GiB. Must be between 5 and 16384.
